element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Horizontal movement and basic shooting mechanics established immediately
Players learn to collect and manage various weapon types throughout progression
Enemy patterns and behaviors increase in complexity through level progression
Players adapt to involuntary slowdown as a navigation tool for high-density encounters

typical_relief_triggers: Momentary safe zones between enemy waves
typical_tension_triggers: Lack of checkpoints forcing level restart on death
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Relentless wave-based tension with minimal relief; difficulty compounded by no-checkpoint design forcing perfect play

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to horizontal scrolling shooter mechanics with basic enemy patterns
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased enemy density and complexity; sprite slowdown becomes frequent navigation factor
difficulty_curve.late_game: Culmination of dense encounters; high sprite count scenarios; punishing level restart mechanics
notable_spikes: Lack of checkpoints creates sustained difficulty spike across all levels
Dense sprite scenarios with slowdown create pacing difficulty spikes

notable_level_patterns.description: Death at any point forces complete level restart from beginning; creates sustained tension throughout level duration
Heavy onscreen enemy concentration causes system slowdown; slowdown functionally becomes a navigation aid for dodging
Scattered supercharged weapon pickups provide momentary relief and tactical options; maintain progression momentum
